events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a crew using a field method for conductor selection & sizing that is less tidy than preferred shop approach but matches listed product instructions and project requirements. No local amendment forbids it. Reference material: NEC 310, Table 310.16.

This is a pass situation - the work is compliant even if not the preferred approach. No defects or hazards flagged.
